description: Use this API to list switched shunt models connected to subsystem buses along with their storage locations in the dynamics data arrays. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = swslist(sid, all, status)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
